title: Opendoor Q1 Earnings Preview and Wall Street Projections
text: Earnings Date & Market Expectations: Opendoor will release Q1 earnings on May 7. The derivatives market anticipates approximately 8.77% stock price volatility following the announcement. The stock currently trades near $5.11, down 12% year-to-date. Financial Projections: Wall Street consensus forecasts an earnings per share of -$0.09, representing improvement from the prior year's -$0.12 loss. Revenue is projected at approximately $666 million, compared to $1.15 billion in the year-ago quarter. Recent Performance Context: Fourth quarter results showed 46% sequential growth in home purchases but revenue declined 20% sequentially. Gross profitability compressed to 7.7% while contribution margin fell to 1%. Analyst Outlook: The Street consensus rating is Hold (2 Buy, 2 Hold, 1 Sell ratings), with an average price target of $6, suggesting 17% upside potential.
